text_block_list.text:
It was at the summer training camp. 
I was at the boardinghouse, racking my brain over what to write——
The paper in front of me was meant to have an advertising plan for her, but it was still totally blank. Though there was a reason I was doing this by myself to begin with——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
We're going to shoot a special feature! 
"Royce-chan's Special Summer Movie"! 
It'll spread the word of Royce all over the globe!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you take the wheel this time, Trainer. 
You'll be producer, director, and cinematographer 
—— The whole package!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right. You. 
——We'll do the shoot the next time we get a break! 
Understood?
Royce and Royce put her trust in me to handle the entire project. So I wanted to make a plan that would not only live up to that trust, but go even further.

If I wanted to do that, I needed to do what we did before… 
Find a charming hidden side of her, and show it off from an unconventional angle.
choice_data_list: Let me give her profile another read!

text_block_list.text: And then, on the day of the shoot——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"Maximize Time and Cost Efficiency! 
Royce and Royce's Tips and Tricks for a Perfect Countryside Summer Getaway" ——
choice_data_list: I figured we'd play to your strengths.
I figured we'd play to your strengths.

text_block_list.text: In the countryside, everything is slow and laid-back, the polar opposite of time efficient. The contrast would make her efficiency stand out all the more.
choice_data_list: This script'll really make you shine!
This script'll really make you shine!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Understood. We'll run with this.
choice_data_list: Huh? You don't have any feedback?
Huh? You don't have any feedback?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Surely you remember what I told you. 
I'm letting you take the wheel!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
First up is the intro. 
How should I read it?
Normally the presentation would be simple to fit our shooting location. But this video was supposed to show off her strengths, so——
choice_data_list: Focus on efficiency from the very start.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"Hey, guys! 
It's time to play with your girl Royce-chan in the countryside♪"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"But wait! Oh nooooo～! 
When you're down by the mountains, there's literally not enough time in the day!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"We'd better not waste daylight! 
Come on, let's hurryyyyy～!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Yippee!! So refreshing～!!! 
…The plan is to entertain myself in the river, if I recall. 
So, what should I do?
The equipment required for rafting and fishing was too cost inefficient. It had to be an activity she could enjoy using nothing but what she could find around her——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"Woooow! It's so pretty～! 
And there's one thing we HAVE to do at such a lovely babbling brook——"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"A leaf boat river race! 
Everything I need to build my ship is right here in this forest!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"Tadaaaaa! Here's the finished product! 
I'm calling her the Phantom EX Edition!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"With branches as an outrigger, it's super duper stable. 
And thanks to the leaf's hydrodynamic shape, it slips right though the water. It's built for speed from the ground up♪"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"First we set it in a spot where the current won't knock it over, and then… 
Ready… set…"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"GO! 
…Yes! Perfect start! 
All that's left is a straight shot to the finish line!!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"Kyaaaa～～♡ 
You're so cool, Phantom EX Edition!"
The shoot went well from there——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Of course. So for our final segment, I'll walk our viewers through the local festival, then crank things up with the outro——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Full speed ahead! 
We're finishing this summer excursion with a bang♪

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"Now what you've all been waiting for! 
Festival mode Royce-chan is on ・ the ・ scene!☆"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: "Listen very closely. Going to a festival is a race against the clock. So I'm going to show some tips and tricks to efficiently enjoy the festival so you won't have to miss a single thing♪"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"There's our target! A stall selling all sorts of food! 
Excuse me, I'd like some takoyaki, okonomiyaki, and yakisoba, please and thank you ♪"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"See how I bought everything I wanted to eat in one go? 
Now I've got more time to have fun!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: "When it comes to shooting gallery games, it's best to just spray and pray. You want to go 'Bang! Pow! C'mon, hit!! Aw, man. Okay, next!!' …Get it?"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: "The best part of shaved ice is the crunch if you eat it before it melts! That can give you brain freeze, but you can avoid it by making sure it doesn't touch the roof of your mouth——"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"～～～～!! 
S-See? I'm perfectly fine～"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. You really got my good side! 
This script really was tailor-made for me.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Right then, now for the outro——
(Crackle……… Boom, boom, boom!)

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Heehee. It seems we've stumbled into VIP seats.

The light of the fireworks cast a warm glow on her face. Without thinking, I picked up the camera and—— 
…I stopped myself.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Hm? Aren't you going to record?
The video was all about efficiency. Her visage as she gazed at the fireworks was charming for sure, but taking things slow like this went against the project's central thesis.
choice_data_list: It'd throw off the whole script, so…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… 
Really now.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
…Then how do you personally feel? 
Do I go well with fireworks?
choice_data_list: …I think you look amazing that way.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
That's reason enough for me. 
I trusted "you" to do this for me, remember?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Don't think, feel. 
Film me, the way YOU see me… 
…Would you do that for me?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"Phew～ Today was so much fun. 
We made so many summer memories in just one day♪"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"And to top it all off… Look! 
We enjoyed ourselves so efficiently, we were right on time to watch the fireworks show!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
"See what you get when you bet on Royce-chan? 
——Teehee♡ 
That's all for today. Next time～!"

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Whew! And that's a wrap! 
That's another step on my journey to the top!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Can I count on you from here on out, Trainer?

It's my dream as her trainer to make her the greatest. 
I didn't even need to think about my answer——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Aren't you being a little cold～? 
What I'm trying to tell you is——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: I want to be with you more and more♡

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Did I hear your heart skip a beat? 
Looks like I win. 
…Just kidding.

I wish I could've taken a video of her impish smile, as a record of our journey to the top together. 
Our journey which was only just beginning.
